title: selliguea hastata subsp. montana
intro: Selliguea hastata subsp. montana, also known as the Mountain Polypody fern or Mountain Selliguea, is a plant species belonging to the family Polypodiaceae. The plant is traditionally used for its medicinal properties, particularly in the treatment of various health issues such as fever, rheumatism, and skin conditions, due to its anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties. The health benefits of Selliguea hastata subsp. montana include its ability to reduce inflammation, promote wound healing, and exhibit antioxidant activity. Traditionally, the plant is prepared in various herbal forms, including teas, infusions, and poultices, to harness its medicinal properties.
